titleStmt.title: SII 24.44: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 44. (A.R. No. 42 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Badly damaged. Seems to refer to a sale of land under orders from Nishadarājar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavuṉ tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramatto
ḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir munaik kontaḷavaraicar taṉtaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppa
ri naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum ṉannilap pāvaiyum tanimai yum ta
vira punitaṟ tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi yiraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyākat tonnilaventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ti
cai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ ṟivāntara
ñcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai paru[ n=talaittiṭa]
letir koṭiṟṟallatu latir koṭā vikkalan ṉaṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavu veṅka
mānamum kūṟiṉa viramum kiṭappa mutuku neḷippa yiḻin=ta netikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalka lamara kuṭa
ḷukkattu tānuṉ tā� la pala mutukum payantetir māri jayap perun tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta puka �ḷāviṭṭa
ṭamum miḷātu kaṅkamaṇṭala mum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi yiraṇṭum Oru vicai
pukaḻoṭu (pāṇṭi) pāṇṭi maṇṭalam koḷḷa ttaṭaittu ka
ṭal ten kaṭalp pāyvatu pola tan peruñ ceṉaiyai yevi pañcavarai varum poruta por kaḷat kkār
ṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammaiyum vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa muttin
calāpamum muttamiḻ potiyilum mattaveṅkari paṭum maiyyacaiyyamum kanni yuṅ kaikko tennāṭṭellai lainā
ṭṭuḷḷa cāverellām tani vicum peṟa veṟiya tan varutanit talaivarai kuṟukular kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa ve
niṣatarājar Evalpaṭi
Āritan kecuvan tani Iḷañ ciṅkamum pāratāyan manum Āka Ayvarum sabhaik kaṇakku perum vāmanaṉin pe
paḷḷippuṟamāna ḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu k kaṟkkuṭiyil samvastarattin Uttecam payire ḻāykkiṭan=ta nilattu
ḷākattu vicaite perunān kellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa �yey Iraṇṭu māvum Irāmatevaviḷākam naṟu kalvi Inni
marakkālāl Aḷakkakkaṭavatākavum Innellukkā The rest of the inscription is peeled off and lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
